":"","choices":null,"attributes":{}},{"name":"{{step[008fa199-5d15-4010-a7ad-2fccbe77742e].flow_status}}","label":"step➛Script Status\",\"read_only_complex_object\":\"true\",\"mandatory\":\"false\",\"order\":\"1\",\"max_length\":\"0\",\"uiUniqueId\":\"8e3eb395-c990-4a7d-b8da-081a1acab7eb\"}"}},"complexObject":{"code":{"$cv":{"$c":"java.lang.String","$v":""}},"message":{"$cv":{"$c":"java.lang.String","$v":""}}},"serializationFormat":"JSON"}676c57acff3b22106b5dffffffffffebsys_hub_action_type_definition7fab176cff3b22106b5dffffffffff3d3sys_variable_valueadmin2025-09-02 {{step[008fa199-5d15-4010-a7ad-2fccbe77742e].quote_number}}__action_status__7fab176cff3b22106b5dffffffffff3dadmin2025-09-02 12:05:282f6c57acff3b22106b5dfffffffffffe0admin2025-09-02 12:05:28var__m_sys_hub_action_output_7fab176cff3b22106b5dffffffffff3d
__dont_treat_as_error__7fab176cff3b22106b5dffffffffff3dadmin2025-09-02 12:05:286b6c57acff3b22106b5dfffffffffffe0admin2025-09-02 12:05:28var__m_sys_hub_action_output_7fab176cff3b22106b5dffffffffff3d
7fab176cff3b22106b5dffffffffff3d008fa199-5d15-4010-a7ad-2fccbe77742e11
106afb6647032200b4fad7527c9a71e7sys_hub_step_instanceadmin2025-09-02 12:05:28false936c57acff3b22106b5dffffffffffcf16false346aff309395f11032e8b8284dba1085bandganesh2026-04-20 14:07:44sys_hub_step_instance936c57acff3b22106b5dffffffffffcf600sys_variable_valueadmin2025-09-02 12:05:28176c57acff3b22106b5dffffffffffe911bandganesh2026-04-20 13:45:04// Code Generated by Sidekick is for learning and experimentation purposes only. (function execute(inputs, outputs) { // ============================================================ // TABLE NAMES // ============================================================ var OPTY_TABLE = 'sn_opty_mgmt_core_opportunity'; var OPTY_LINE_TABLE = 'sn_opty_mgmt_core_opportunity_line_item'; var QUOTE_TABLE = 'sn_quote_mgmt_core_quote'; var QUOTE_LINE_ITEM_TABLE = 'sn_quote_mgmt_core_quote_line_item'; // ============================================================ // DEFAULT OUTPUTS — always String primitives, never GlideRecord // ============================================================ outputs.flow_status = 'error'; outputs.quote_number = ''; outputs.quote_sys_id = ''; outputs.message = ''; gs.info('===================================================='); gs.info(' ACTION START: Create Quote From Opportunity'); gs.info('===================================================='); // ============================================================ // STEP 1 — Validate Input // ============================================================ gs.info('STEP 1: Validating inputs...'); gs.info(' ➡️ opportunity_id : ' + inputs.opportunity_id); gs.info(' ➡️ source : ' + inputs.source); gs.info(' ➡️ context : ' + inputs.context); gs.info(' ➡️ oppty_line_sys_ids : ' + inputs.oppty_line_sys_ids); if (!inputs.opportunity_id || inputs.opportunity_id.trim() === '') { gs.info('❌ INPUT ERROR: opportunity_id is empty or missing.'); outputs.flow_status = 'error'; outputs.message = 'No Opportunity number was provided. Please supply a valid Opportunity number such as OPTY0001114.'; return; } var opportunityId = inputs.opportunity_id.trim().toUpperCase(); var source = inputs.source || 'manual'; var context = inputs.context || ''; var lineIds = inputs.oppty_line_sys_ids || ''; gs.info(' ✅ Inputs validated.'); // ============================================================ // STEP 2 — Fetch Opportunity // ✅ GlideRecordSecure — resolves platform warning // ============================================================ gs.info('----------------------------------------------------'); gs.info('STEP 2: Fetching Opportunity from ' + OPTY_TABLE + '...'); var oppty_gr = new GlideRecordSecure(OPTY_TABLE); oppty_gr.addQuery('number', opportunityId); oppty_gr.query(); if (!oppty_gr.next()) { gs.info('❌ OPPORTUNITY NOT FOUND: ' + opportunityId); outputs.flow_status = 'error'; outputs.message = 'Opportunity ' + opportunityId + ' was not found. Please verify the number and try again.'; return; } var opptySysId = oppty_gr.getUniqueValue(); gs.info('✅ Opportunity found!'); gs.info(' ➡️ Sys ID : ' + opptySysId); gs.info(' ➡️ Number : ' + oppty_gr.getValue('number')); gs.info(' ➡️ Account : ' + oppty_gr.getDisplayValue('account')); gs.info(' ➡️ Stage : ' + oppty_gr.getDisplayValue('sales_stage')); // ============================================================ // STEP 3 — Count Opportunity Line Items (informational) // ============================================================ gs.info('----------------------------------------------------'); gs.info('STEP 3: Counting Opportunity Line Items from ' + OPTY_LINE_TABLE + '...'); var opptyLineGR = new GlideRecordSecure(OPTY_LINE_TABLE); opptyLineGR.addQuery('opportunity', opptySysId); opptyLineGR.query(); var opptyLineCount = 0; while (opptyLineGR.next()) { opptyLineCount++; } gs.info(' ➡️ Opportunity Line Items : ' + opptyLineCount); if (opptyLineCount === 0) { gs.info(' ⚠️ No line items found — Quote will be created without lines.'); } // ============================================================ // STEP 4 — Create Quote via QuoteIntegration API // Fresh GlideRecordSecure fetch before passing to API // ============================================================ gs.info('----------------------------------------------------'); gs.info('STEP 4: Invoking QuoteIntegration.createQuoteFromOpty()...'); var commitResult = null; try { var oppty_gr_api = new GlideRecordSecure(OPTY_TABLE); oppty_gr_api.addQuery('number', opportunityId); oppty_gr_api.query(); oppty_gr_api.next(); commitResult = new sn_opty_mgmt.QuoteIntegration().createQuoteFromOpty( oppty_gr_api, source, context, lineIds ); gs.info('✅ createQuoteFromOpty() executed.'); gs.info(' ➡️ Raw Result : ' + JSON.stringify(commitResult)); // commitResult returns a string array e.g. ["Quote Created. View <a href='...'>QT0001080</a>"] // Check for "Quote Created" string — do NOT use .status property (it will be undefined) var resultStr = JSON.stringify(commitResult); if (resultStr && resultStr.indexOf('Quote Created') !== -1) { outputs.flow_status = 'success'; gs.info(' ✅ "Quote Created" confirmed in result.'); } else { outputs.flow_status = 'error'; gs.info(' ❌ "Quote Created" not found in result — treating as error.'); outputs.message = 'Quote creation was attempted for ' + opportunityId + ' but the expected confirmation was not returned. Raw result: ' + resultStr; return; } } catch (createError) { gs.info('❌ QUOTE CREATION FAILED!'); gs.info(' ➡️ Error Message : ' + createError.message); outputs.flow_status = 'error'; outputs.message = 'Quote creation failed for Opportunity ' + opportunityId + '. Error: ' + createError.message; return; } // ============================================================ // STEP 5 — Handle Automatic Source Flags (only if source = automatic) // ============================================================ if (source === 'automatic') { gs.info('----------------------------------------------------'); gs.info('STEP 5: Handling automatic source flags...'); var oppty_gr_flag = new GlideRecordSecure(OPTY_TABLE); oppty_gr_flag.addQuery('number', opportunityId); oppty_gr_flag.query(); oppty_gr_flag.next(); try { new sn_opty_mgmt.QuoteIntegration().setAutoQuoteGeneratedFlag( oppty_gr_flag, commitResult ); gs.info('✅ setAutoQuoteGeneratedFlag() completed.'); } catch (flagError) { gs.info('⚠️ setAutoQuoteGeneratedFlag() failed: ' + flagError.message); } try { new sn_opty_mgmt.QuoteIntegration().logOpptyLinesFailedAutoQuoteCreation( oppty_gr_flag, commitResult ); gs.info('✅ logOpptyLinesFailedAutoQuoteCreation() completed.'); } catch (logError) { gs.info('⚠️ logOpptyLinesFailedAutoQuoteCreation() failed: ' + logError.message); } } else { gs.info('STEP 5: Skipped — source is not automatic.'); } // ============================================================ // STEP 6 — Verify Quote Record in QUOTE_TABLE // ============================================================ gs.info('----------------------------------------------------'); gs.info('STEP 6: Verifying Quote in ' + QUOTE_TABLE + '...'); var verifyQuote = new GlideRecordSecure(QUOTE_TABLE); verifyQuote.addQuery('source_opportunity', opptySysId); verifyQuote.orderByDesc('sys_created_on'); verifyQuote.setLimit(1); verifyQuote.query(); if (verifyQuote.next()) { var quoteSysId = verifyQuote.getUniqueValue(); var quoteNumber = verifyQuote.getValue('number') || ''; var quoteStage = verifyQuote.getDisplayValue('state'); var quoteCreated = verifyQuote.getDisplayValue('sys_created_on'); // ✅ Set String outputs — never assign GlideRecord to outputs outputs.quote_sys_id = quoteSysId; outputs.quote_number = quoteNumber; outputs.message = 'Quote ' + quoteNumber + ' has been successfully created for Opportunity ' + opportunityId + '.'; gs.info('✅ Quote confirmed!'); gs.info(' ➡️ Quote Number : ' + quoteNumber); gs.info(' ➡️ Quote Sys ID : ' + quoteSysId); gs.info(' ➡️ Stage : ' + quoteStage); gs.info(' ➡️ Created On : ' + quoteCreated); // ============================================================ // STEP 7 — Count Quote Line Items // ============================================================ gs.info('----------------------------------------------------'); gs.info('STEP 7: Counting Quote Line Items from ' + QUOTE_LINE_ITEM_TABLE + '...'); var quoteLineGR = new GlideRecordSecure(QUOTE_LINE_ITEM_TABLE); quoteLineGR.addQuery('quote', quoteSysId); quoteLineGR.query(); var quoteLineCount = 0; while (quoteLineGR.next()) { quoteLineCount++; } gs.info(' ➡️ Quote Line Items : ' + quoteLineCount); if (quoteLineCount === 0) { gs.info(' ⚠️ No line items on Quote — Opportunity may have had no lines.'); } } else { // Quote creation reported success but record not yet visible // Likely async commit still in progress — flow_status remains success outputs.message = 'Quote creation was initiated for Opportunity ' + opportunityId + '. The quote record may still be processing — please check back shortly.'; gs.info('⚠️ Quote not yet visible in ' + QUOTE_TABLE + ' — async commit may be in progress.'); } gs.info('===================================================='); gs.info(' ACTION COMPLETE'); gs.info(' ➡️ flow_status : ' + outputs.flow_status); gs.info(' ➡️ quote_number : ' + outputs.quote_number); gs.info(' ➡️ quote_sys_id : ' + outputs.quote_sys_id); gs.info(' ➡️ message : ' + outputs.message); gs.info('===================================================='); })(inputs, outputs); 71aa7f6647032200b4fad7527c9a719bsys_hub_step_instance936c57acff3b22106b5dffffffffffcf400sys_variable_valueadmin2025-09-02 12:05:289b6c57acff3b22106b5dffffffffffe80admin2025-09-02 12:05:2835aa573fd7802200bdbaee5b5e610375f5e56d79b3101300176b051a16a8dce4context936c57acff3b22106b5dffffffffffcfadmin2025-09-02 12:17:19bc2fdb60ff7b22106b5dffffffffff3b1bandganesh2026-04-20 12:04:24var__m_sys_hub_step_ext_input_936c57acff3b22106b5dffffffffffcf

__dont_treat_as_error__d622e764ff7b22106b5dffffffffffc1admin2025-09-02 12:30:322e222b64ff7b22106b5dffffffffff2e0admin2025-09-02 12:30:32var__m_sys_hub_action_output_d622e764ff7b22106b5dffffffffffc1
d622e764ff7b22106b5dffffffffffc1008fa199-5d15-4010-a7ad-2fccbe77742e11
106afb6647032200b4fad7527c9a71e7sys_hub_step_instanceadmin2025-09-02 12:30:31false9222e764ff7b22106b5dffffffffffe511false346aff309395f11032e8b8284dba1085bandganesh2026-04-20 14:08:44sys_hub_step_instance9222e764ff7b22106b5dffffffffffe5600sys_variable_valueadmin2025-09-02 12:30:3126222b64ff7b22106b5dffffffffff009bandganesh2026-04-20 13:48:32// Code Generated by Sidekick is for learning and experimentation purposes only. (function execute(inputs, outputs) { // ============================================================ // TABLE NAMES // ============================================================ var OPTY_TABLE = 'sn_opty_mgmt_core_opportunity'; var OPTY_LINE_TABLE = 'sn_opty_mgmt_core_opportunity_line_item'; var QUOTE_TABLE = 'sn_quote_mgmt_core_quote'; var QUOTE_LINE_ITEM_TABLE = 'sn_quote_mgmt_core_quote_line_item'; // ============================================================ // DEFAULT OUTPUTS — always String primitives, never GlideRecord // ============================================================ outputs.flow_status = 'error'; outputs.quote_number = ''; outputs.quote_sys_id = ''; outputs.message = ''; gs.info('===================================================='); gs.info(' ACTION START: Create Quote From Opportunity'); gs.info('===================================================='); // ============================================================ // STEP 1 — Validate Input // ============================================================ gs.info('STEP 1: Validating inputs...'); gs.info(' ➡️ opportunity_id : ' + inputs.opportunity_id); gs.info(' ➡️ source : ' + inputs.source); gs.info(' ➡️ context : ' + inputs.context); gs.info(' ➡️ oppty_line_sys_ids : ' + inputs.oppty_line_sys_ids); if (!inputs.opportunity_id || inputs.opportunity_id.trim() === '') { gs.info('❌ INPUT ERROR: opportunity_id is empty or missing.'); outputs.flow_status = 'error'; outputs.message = 'No Opportunity number was provided. Please supply a valid Opportunity number such as OPTY0001114.'; return; } var opportunityId = inputs.opportunity_id.trim().toUpperCase(); var source = inputs.source || 'manual'; var context = inputs.context || ''; var lineIds = inputs.oppty_line_sys_ids || ''; gs.info(' ✅ Inputs validated.'); // ============================================================ // STEP 2 — Fetch Opportunity // ✅ GlideRecordSecure — resolves platform warning // ============================================================ gs.info('----------------------------------------------------'); gs.info('STEP 2: Fetching Opportunity from ' + OPTY_TABLE + '...'); var oppty_gr = new GlideRecordSecure(OPTY_TABLE); oppty_gr.addQuery('number', opportunityId); oppty_gr.query(); if (!oppty_gr.next()) { gs.info('❌ OPPORTUNITY NOT FOUND: ' + opportunityId); outputs.flow_status = 'error'; outputs.message = 'Opportunity ' + opportunityId + ' was not found. Please verify the number and try again.'; return; } var opptySysId = oppty_gr.getUniqueValue(); gs.info('✅ Opportunity found!'); gs.info(' ➡️ Sys ID : ' + opptySysId); gs.info(' ➡️ Number : ' + oppty_gr.getValue('number')); gs.info(' ➡️ Account : ' + oppty_gr.getDisplayValue('account')); gs.info(' ➡️ Stage : ' + oppty_gr.getDisplayValue('sales_stage')); // ============================================================ // STEP 3 — Count Opportunity Line Items (informational) // ============================================================ gs.info('----------------------------------------------------'); gs.info('STEP 3: Counting Opportunity Line Items from ' + OPTY_LINE_TABLE + '...'); var opptyLineGR = new GlideRecordSecure(OPTY_LINE_TABLE); opptyLineGR.addQuery('opportunity', opptySysId); opptyLineGR.query(); var opptyLineCount = 0; while (opptyLineGR.next()) { opptyLineCount++; } gs.info(' ➡️ Opportunity Line Items : ' + opptyLineCount); if (opptyLineCount === 0) { gs.info(' ⚠️ No line items found — Quote will be created without lines.'); } // ============================================================ // STEP 4 — Create Quote via QuoteIntegration API // Fresh GlideRecordSecure fetch before passing to API // ============================================================ gs.info('----------------------------------------------------'); gs.info('STEP 4: Invoking QuoteIntegration.createQuoteFromOpty()...'); var commitResult = null; try { var oppty_gr_api = new GlideRecordSecure(OPTY_TABLE); oppty_gr_api.addQuery('number', opportunityId); oppty_gr_api.query(); oppty_gr_api.next(); commitResult = new sn_opty_mgmt.QuoteIntegration().createQuoteFromOpty( oppty_gr_api, source, context, lineIds ); gs.info('✅ createQuoteFromOpty() executed.'); gs.info(' ➡️ Raw Result : ' + JSON.stringify(commitResult)); // commitResult returns a string array e.g. ["Quote Created. View <a href='...'>QT0001080</a>"] // Check for "Quote Created" string — do NOT use .status property (it will be undefined) var resultStr = JSON.stringify(commitResult); if (resultStr && resultStr.indexOf('Quote Created') !== -1) { outputs.flow_status = 'success'; gs.info(' ✅ "Quote Created" confirmed in result.'); } else { outputs.flow_status = 'error'; gs.info(' ❌ "Quote Created" not found in result — treating as error.'); outputs.message = 'Quote creation was attempted for ' + opportunityId + ' but the expected confirmation was not returned. Raw result: ' + resultStr; return; } } catch (createError) { gs.info('❌ QUOTE CREATION FAILED!'); gs.info(' ➡️ Error Message : ' + createError.message); outputs.flow_status = 'error'; outputs.message = 'Quote creation failed for Opportunity ' + opportunityId + '. Error: ' + createError.message; return; } // ============================================================ // STEP 5 — Handle Automatic Source Flags (only if source = automatic) // ============================================================ if (source === 'automatic') { gs.info('----------------------------------------------------'); gs.info('STEP 5: Handling automatic source flags...'); var oppty_gr_flag = new GlideRecordSecure(OPTY_TABLE); oppty_gr_flag.addQuery('number', opportunityId); oppty_gr_flag.query(); oppty_gr_flag.next(); try { new sn_opty_mgmt.QuoteIntegration().setAutoQuoteGeneratedFlag( oppty_gr_flag, commitResult ); gs.info('✅ setAutoQuoteGeneratedFlag() completed.'); } catch (flagError) { gs.info('⚠️ setAutoQuoteGeneratedFlag() failed: ' + flagError.message); } try { new sn_opty_mgmt.QuoteIntegration().logOpptyLinesFailedAutoQuoteCreation( oppty_gr_flag, commitResult ); gs.info('✅ logOpptyLinesFailedAutoQuoteCreation() completed.'); } catch (logError) { gs.info('⚠️ logOpptyLinesFailedAutoQuoteCreation() failed: ' + logError.message); } } else { gs.info('STEP 5: Skipped — source is not automatic.'); } // ============================================================ // STEP 6 — Verify Quote Record in QUOTE_TABLE // ============================================================ gs.info('----------------------------------------------------'); gs.info('STEP 6: Verifying Quote in ' + QUOTE_TABLE + '...'); var verifyQuote = new GlideRecordSecure(QUOTE_TABLE); verifyQuote.addQuery('source_opportunity', opptySysId); verifyQuote.orderByDesc('sys_created_on'); verifyQuote.setLimit(1); verifyQuote.query(); if (verifyQuote.next()) { var quoteSysId = verifyQuote.getUniqueValue(); var quoteNumber = verifyQuote.getValue('number') || ''; var quoteStage = verifyQuote.getDisplayValue('state'); var quoteCreated = verifyQuote.getDisplayValue('sys_created_on'); // ✅ Set String outputs — never assign GlideRecord to outputs outputs.quote_sys_id = quoteSysId; outputs.quote_number = quoteNumber; outputs.message = 'Quote ' + quoteNumber + ' has been successfully created for Opportunity ' + opportunityId + '.'; gs.info('✅ Quote confirmed!'); gs.info(' ➡️ Quote Number : ' + quoteNumber); gs.info(' ➡️ Quote Sys ID : ' + quoteSysId); gs.info(' ➡️ Stage : ' + quoteStage); gs.info(' ➡️ Created On : ' + quoteCreated); // ============================================================ // STEP 7 — Count Quote Line Items // ============================================================ gs.info('----------------------------------------------------'); gs.info('STEP 7: Counting Quote Line Items from ' + QUOTE_LINE_ITEM_TABLE + '...'); var quoteLineGR = new GlideRecordSecure(QUOTE_LINE_ITEM_TABLE); quoteLineGR.addQuery('quote', quoteSysId); quoteLineGR.query(); var quoteLineCount = 0; while (quoteLineGR.next()) { quoteLineCount++; } gs.info(' ➡️ Quote Line Items : ' + quoteLineCount); if (quoteLineCount === 0) { gs.info(' ⚠️ No line items on Quote — Opportunity may have had no lines.'); } } else { // Quote creation reported success but record not yet visible // Likely async commit still in progress — flow_status remains success outputs.message = 'Quote creation was initiated for Opportunity ' + opportunityId + '. The quote record may still be processing — please check back shortly.'; gs.info('⚠️ Quote not yet visible in ' + QUOTE_TABLE + ' — async commit may be in progress.'); } gs.info('===================================================='); gs.info(' ACTION COMPLETE'); gs.info(' ➡️ flow_status : ' + outputs.flow_status); gs.info(' ➡️ quote_number : ' + outputs.quote_number); gs.info(' ➡️ quote_sys_id : ' + outputs.quote_sys_id); gs.info(' ➡️ message : ' + outputs.message); gs.info('===================================================='); })(inputs, outputs); 71aa7f6647032200b4fad7527c9a719bsys_hub_step_instance9222e764ff7b22106b5dffffffffffe5400sys_variable_valueadmin2025-09-02 12:30:3162222b64ff7b22106b5dffffffffff000admin2025-09-02 12:30:3135aa573fd7802200bdbaee5b5e610375f5e56d79b3101300176b051a16a8dce4context9222e764ff7b22106b5dffffffffffe5admin2025-09-02 12:30:316e222b64ff7b22106b5dffffffffff000admin2025-09-02 12:30:31var__m_sys_hub_step_ext_input_9222e764ff7b22106b5dffffffffffe5
